name: Zigong [Limbus Company]
description:

Had to take some liberties with her character given that we know jack shit about her.

Also I'm making Zilu soon.

Saw the art before doing the intervallo and I got really excited thinking it was Jia Yuanchun

God I need Yuanchun I don't even know what she looks like but I know I NEED HER
